title: Senior Software Engineer - LG Soft India Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - LG Soft India Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
LG Soft India Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LG Soft India Holdings Services:
LG Soft India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India Holdings Services!
